---
title: "Research Members"
---

::: {.grid .gap-4}

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Bakk.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://www.universiteitleiden.nl/en/staffmembers/zsuzsa-bakk#tab-1)

**Zsuzsa Bakk**  
Assistant Professor, Instituut Psychologie, Methodologie & Statistiek, Universiteit Leiden, The Netherlands
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Beh.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=EQE6sQsAAAAJ&hl=en)

**Eric Beh**  
Extra-ordinary Professor, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/placeholder.png){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://paulabritoweb.wordpress.com/)

**Paula Brito**  
Associate Professor in Statistics and Data Analysis at the Faculty of Economics (Group of Mathematics and Information Sciences) of the University of Porto
:::
::::


::: {.grid .gap-4}

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Cavicchia.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://carlocavicchia.github.io/)

**Carlo Cavicchia**  
Assistant Professor, Econometrics Institute, Erasmus University, Rotterdam, The Netherlands
:::


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
![](images/Choulakian.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}

**Vartan Choulakian**  
Professor, Mathematics and Statistics, Université De Moncton, Canada
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Coetzer.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://drupal-test5.nwu.ac.za/statistics-statistical-consultation-services/roelof-coetzer)

**Roelof Coetzer**  
Professor, North West University
:::

::::


::: {.grid .gap-4}

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/deRooij.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://markderooij.info/)

**Mark de Rooij**  
Professor, Artificial Intelligence and Data Theory, Universiteit Leiden, The Netherlands
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Filzmoser.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://cstat.tuwien.ac.at/)

**Peter Filzmoser**  
Professor, Head of research unit Computational Statistics, Institute of Statistics and Mathematical Methods in Economics, Vienna University of Technology, Austria
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Ganey.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://raeesaganey91.github.io/rganey_quarto/)

**Raeesa Ganey**  
Lecturer, University of the Witwatersrand, South Africa
:::

::::

::: {.grid .gap-4}


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/placeholder.png){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://markderooij.info/)

**Michael Greenacre**  
Professor, Pompeu Fabra University, Barcelona, Spain
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Groenen.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://www.eur.nl/en/people/patrick-groenen)

**Patrick Groenen**  
Professor and Dean, Erasmus School of Economics, Erasmus University, The Netherlands
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
![](images/Iodice.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}

**Alfonso Iodice D’Enza**  
Professor, Department of Political Sciences, University of Naples Federico II, Italy
:::

::::

::: {.grid .gap-4}


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Lamont.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://sites.google.com/site/mmclamont)

**Morne Lamont**  
Senior lecturer, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
![](images/placeholder.png){.rounded-circle width="150"}

**Susan Laurens**  
Heineken
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/leRoux.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://scholar.google.co.za/citations?user=-46FLkcAAAAJ&amp;amp;hl=en)

**Niël le Roux**  
Emeritus Professor, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::
::::

::: {.grid .gap-4}


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Liebenberg.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://scholar.google.co.za/citations?user=ckitJMQAAAAJ&amp;hl=en)

**Shawn Liebenberg**  
Senior lecturer, North West University
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Lombardo.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://www.economia.unicampania.it/dipartimento/docenti?MATRICOLA=057444)

**Rosaria Lombardo**  
Professor, University of Campania “Luigi Vanvitelli”, Italy
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Lubbe.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://sugnet.github.io/Academic/)

**Sugnet Lubbe**  
Professor, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::
::::


::: {.grid .gap-4}


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Markos.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](http://www.amarkos.gr/about/)

**Angelos Markos**  
Associate Professor, Democritus University of Thrace, Greece
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Nienkemper_Swanepoel J.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://jnienk.github.io/jns-quarto/)

**Johané Nienkemper-Swanepoel**  
Senior Lecturer, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Rossouw.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Ruan-Rossouw)

**Ruan Rossouw**  
Senior Data Scientist, Sasol, South Africa
:::
::::


::: {.grid .gap-4}


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Schoonees.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://www.eur.nl/en/people/pieter-schoonees)

**Pieter Schoonees**  
Assistant Professor, Erasmus School of Economics, Erasmus University, The Netherlands
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/Steyn.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://za.linkedin.com/in/luca-steyn-a9875a16b)

**Luca Steyn**  
Lecturer, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
![](images/Uys.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}

**Danie Uys**  
Associate Professor, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::
::::

::: {.grid .gap-4}

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
![](images/CJvanderMerwe.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}

**Carel van der Merwe**  
Independent Risk Analyst, South Africa
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/SvanderMerwe.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://seanvdm.co.za/)

**Sean van der Merwe**  
Academic Head of Department, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, University of the Free State.
:::
::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/vanderWesthuizen.jpg){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://stephanvdw.wixsite.com/academicprofile/about)

**Stephan van der Westhuizen**  
Senior Lecturer, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, Stellenbosch University
:::
:::



::: {.grid .gap-4}


::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}
[![](images/placeholder.png){.rounded-circle width="150"}](https://www.eur.nl/people/michel-van-de-velden)

**Michel van de Velden**  
Associate Professor of Statistics at the Econometric Institute of the Erasmus University Rotterdam
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}

:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-center}

:::

:::
